name: Cheese Manicotti Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Ricotta Cheese, or cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute chopped onions and mushrooms until tender.
2. Steam chopped spinach until wilted (or use thawed frozen spinach).
3. Combine ricotta, mozzarella, 3/4 cup of Parmesan, eggs, parsley, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
4. Add spinach and the sauteed vegetables to the mixture.
5. Fill uncooked manicotti shells with this filling.
6. Place the filled shells in a single layer in a greased 13x9 baking pan.
7. Add the remaining sauteed vegetables to the spaghetti sauce.
8. Cover the manicotti with the sauce and sprinkle with the remaining Parmesan.
9. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
This is probably my favorite Italian dish.
